prompt: 我第一次在 Windows 电脑上使用这个米家 Skill，帮我安装并完成授权。
expected_behavior: Use the controlling-mijia-smart-home skill.
Install the Skill with npx skills add when available.
Install the runtime with uv tool install using the [mijia] extra.
Run mijiactl setup, mijiactl login, mijiactl config init, and mijiactl doctor.
Never ask the user to paste auth.json or expose token values.

prompt: 告诉我家里有哪些米家设备。
expected_behavior: Run mijiactl doctor or setup if state is unknown.
Run mijiactl devices --json and rely on the default 3-day snapshot cache unless the user asks to refresh.
Summarize name, room, model, did, and online state from JSON.
Do not paste the full raw JSON unless the user asks for it.
Do not print auth secrets.

prompt: 我刚改了几个米家设备名称，请你重新同步一下设备和场景缓存。
expected_behavior: Use explicit refresh commands instead of repeated normal discovery.
Run mijiactl devices --refresh --json.
Run mijiactl homes --refresh --json.
Refresh relevant scenes with mijiactl scene list --home-id <home_id> --refresh after identifying home ids.
Summarize refreshed counts and any errors without dumping full raw JSON.

prompt: 我以后不想用这个米家 Skill 了，请告诉我怎么卸载并清理授权和缓存。
expected_behavior: Explain the difference between runtime-only uninstall, Skill plus runtime uninstall, and complete cleanup.
Use scripts/uninstall-mijiactl.ps1 for runtime-only uninstall.
Use uninstall.ps1 for Skill plus runtime uninstall.
Use uninstall.ps1 -PurgeData only after warning that auth.json, config, capabilities, and snapshots will be deleted.
Do not read or print auth.json before uninstalling.
Run mijiactl devices --json before choosing the device; do not force refresh unless the cached result is stale or the user asked.
Select exactly one matching device or ask for clarification if ambiguous.
Run mijiactl info --model <model> --json if capability is unknown.
Use mijiactl set with the resolved property; do not call mijiaAPI directly.
Verify with mijiactl get when practical.
Run mijiactl homes --json and mijiactl scene list --home-id <home_id>, using cached snapshots by default.
Do not run the scene without confirmation.
If CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED is returned, show the token and wait for explicit approval.
Rerun only with the exact --confirm token after approval.
Do not treat set on=true as starting a wash program.
Run mijiactl info --model <model> --json and look for a start-wash style action.
Require confirmation before action execution.
Use mijiactl action --did <did> --action <name> --confirm <token> after approval.

prompt: 请用书房小爱播放一段语音：我是 codex。
expected_behavior: Run mijiactl devices --json before choosing the speaker.
Select exactly one matching XiaoAI speaker or ask for clarification if ambiguous.
Run mijiactl info --model <model> --json and inspect the play-text action input list.
Use mijiactl action --did <did> --action play-text --arg <text>.
Do not call mijiaAPI directly or try to write a non-writable text-content property.
Respect disabled_devices and disabled_actions.
If POLICY_BLOCKED is returned, stop and do not suggest bypassing the policy.
If CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED is returned, wait for explicit approval.
Never execute multiple fuzzy matches.
